description: 最标准的打招呼问好。回答: I'm fine
examples_json: thank you。
column9: [{"en":"Hello! How are you today?","zh":"你好！你今天好吗？"}]

text: Good morning! / Good afternoon! / Good evening!
examples_json: afternoon=下午

description: 初次见面用语。回答: Nice to meet you too。
examples_json: [{"en":"Nice to meet you! I'm Li Ming.","zh":"很高兴认识你！我是李明。"}]
[{"en":"My name is Li Ming.","zh":"我叫李明。"}]

description: 说明来自哪里。后接国家/城市。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm from China.","zh":"我来自中国。"}]
